name: Observation Protocol
description: The language-neutral contract between ObservationEvent producers (SDKs) and consumers (the platform). This file declares the THREE independently-evolvable versions and points at the normative artifacts.

protocol_version.meaning: The semantic contract: required/optional/derived fields, validation rules, attribution derivation. Bumps only on a contract change. Within v1.x: additive optional fields only — never repurpose or remove an existing field.

schema_version.meaning: Revision of the JSON Schema artifact. May advance for editorial/clarity fixes WITHOUT changing protocol_version.

sdk_version.meaning: Each SDK package versions independently (e.g. observation-sdk 0.1.0). An SDK states which protocol_version it implements; its own version is orthogonal.

compatibility.policy: Backward compatible within v1.x. Breaking the contract or a field's meaning is v2.0 and requires an ADR + migration path.

certification.criterion: An implementation is certified for protocol_version 1.0 when it accepts EVERY 'valid' case and rejects EVERY 'invalid' case in protocol/conformance/manifest.json, with each rejection's error containing the case's 'match' substring.
certification.reference_implementation: The Conformance Kit (protocol/conformance/) is the reference — NOT any single SDK.
